NCT04619797.label: Outcome
NCT04619797.text: At data cutoff (median follow-up, 11.8 months), median investigator-assessed progression-free survival was 8.3 months (95% CI, 7.1-9.6 months) with tiragolumab plus atezolizumab plus chemotherapy vs 9.9 months (95% CI, 8.7-11.9 months) with placebo plus pembrolizumab plus chemotherapy (hazard ratio, 1.27; 95% CI, 1.02-1.57; P = .99); median overall survival was 18.9 months (95% CI, 15.2-23.8 months) vs 23.1 months (95% CI, 20.7-33.0 months) in each treatment group, respectively (hazard ratio, 1.33; 95% CI, 1.02-1.73; P = .98).

NCT04524871.label: Outcome
NCT04524871.text: The confirmed objective response rate was 43% (95% CI 27-59, n=17) in the tiragolumab plus atezolizumab plus bevacizumab group and 11% (1-35, n=2) in the atezolizumab plus bevacizumab group.
